JUDGE: SUSAN BREALL CLERK: SANDRA STARK CSR:KAREN BAUER ASSIGNED DEPT. 414 SETT. CONF. ON TRIAL DAY. SETTLED; TERMS ON RECORD: STIP. DEF. TO VACATE PREMISES 505-26TH AVE, APT. A, BY 12-31-01. RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED; PLTF. WAIVED BACK RENT THRU DATE DEF. VACATES. IF DEF. FAILS TO VACATE, PLTF. CAN APPLY W/48 HRS. NOTICE FOR REST. OF PREMISES, FOREFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT, PRIOR DUE RENT, ATTY. FEES & COSTS. NO OTHER STAYS OR MOS. FOR STAYS. IF DEF. WISHES TO STAY BEYOND 12-31-01, MAY REMAIN UNTIL 3-15-02 IF HE GIVES NOTICE & PAYS $615 FOR EACH MO. IF DEF. VACATES, PLTF. WILL FILE DISMISSAL. NO JUDGMENT TO BE ENT. UNLESS AGREEMENT BREACHED. (414)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YAMAMOTO, ALAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 505-26TH AVE, APT.A, LEASE FORFEITED
